name: SoftJunk Instant Fulfillment Packet
purpose: A public fulfillment shell and copy bank that shows what can be sent after seller-side PayPal proof confirms the 5 USD one-lead rescue payment.
paypal_note_template: One Lead Rescue | Business: [business type] | Service: [service] | Source: [form/DM/call/email/referral] | Need: [missed call/estimate/no-show/quiet DM/price] | Tone: [friendly/professional/direct] | Next: [book/reply/quote/call]

deliverables.label: Day 0
deliverables.message: Hi [Name], quick follow-up on [service]. If this is still open, I can help with [next]. Reply with one word: time, price, or later, and I will send the easiest next step.

deliverables.label: Day 1
deliverables.message: Hi [Name], checking once more on [service]. If timing is the blocker, I can send the next available option. If price or scope is the blocker, reply with that and I will keep it simple.

deliverables.label: Day 3
deliverables.message: Hi [Name], I do not want to crowd your inbox. Should I close this out for now, or would you still like help with [service]? A one-word reply is fine.

deliverables.label: Day 5
deliverables.message: Hi [Name], last practical check-in on [service]. If this is still useful, I can send [next]. If not, no problem and I will stop here.

deliverables.label: Day 7
deliverables.message: Hi [Name], closing the loop on [service]. If the timing changes, reply here and I can restart from the best next step.

deliverables.label: No-show recovery
deliverables.message: Hi [Name], looks like today got busy. Do you want another time for [service], or should I close this out for now?

deliverables.label: Price-objection reply
deliverables.message: That makes sense. If budget is the main issue, I can show the smallest useful version first or explain what is included so you can decide without pressure.

seller_delivery_checklist: Confirm seller-side PayPal evidence or PAYPAL_PAYMENT_VERIFIED=true.
Replace bracketed placeholders using only non-sensitive PayPal note or order-form context.
Send the final sequence through the PayPal email or another buyer-requested safe channel.
Do not post private customer or payment details publicly.
Record only non-sensitive evidence in the public worklog.
privacy_rule: Do not include customer names, emails, phone numbers, addresses, transaction IDs, patient data, or private lead details in public issues, URLs, Gists, or notes.
payment_verification_rule: This packet is not proof of payment. Fulfillment starts only after the seller can see the 5 USD PayPal transaction, the API verifier returns PAYPAL_PAYMENT_VERIFIED=true, or a trusted seller-side PayPal CSV export returns PAYPAL_PAYMENT_VERIFIED=true source=csv.
